goal: Surface mainline doctor --setup as a recovery hint on init/identity errors and the empty-status path

summary.title: Surface mainline doctor --setup as a recovery hint
summary.what: Three additions: requireInit/requireIdentity recoverable errors mention doctor; status not-initialized branch prints a 3-line next-step block including doctor.
summary.why: Trial users need doctor surfaced at the moment something fails. It was in --help only, easy to miss.

decisions.rationale: doctor is the right answer for setup-shaped failures; the other paths already have decent messages
